tasks.subject: Task 1: Native Windows symlink creation
tasks.description:
handle_create_symlink windows arm via symlink_file/dir; privilege-error mapping; target policy-checked.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/fs_ops.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd file_manager", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dir vs file by target", "ERROR_PRIVILEGE_NOT_HELD mapped", "target outside allowlist denied"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Windows ACL chmod
tasks.description:
Read WindowsAcl proto FIRST (escalate if thin); implement via icacls precedent; read-back test.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/fs_ops.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd file_manager", "acceptanceCriteria": ["honors proto surface only", "icacls read-back asserts principal/rights"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Harden sanitize_env for Windows
tasks.description:
PATH override via split_paths prepend-only contract; justified Windows blocklist additions only.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/openclaw/handler.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd openclaw", "acceptanceCriteria": ["prepend-only helper cross-platform tested", "no speculative blocklist padding"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Case-insensitive policy matching on Windows
tasks.description:
glob matches_with case_sensitive=false on windows; separator behavior verified+documented; unix unchanged.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/policy.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd file_manager", "acceptanceCriteria": ["denylist blocks case variants on windows", "unix stays case-sensitive"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Un-gate strict-mode shell e2e for Windows
tasks.description:
unique_output_path temp_dir; cmd /C command; remove cfg(unix); both invariants on both OS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/openclaw/handler.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd openclaw", "acceptanceCriteria": ["real cmd /C job on windows CI", "approval invariants hold both platforms"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Explicit named-pipe security descriptor
tasks.description:
create_secured_pipe helper (one of 3 sites) with owner/SYSTEM/Admins-only SDDL via windows-sys; no leak; loopback still green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahand-platform/src/ipc.rs", "crates/ahand-platform/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahand-platform ipc && cargo check --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc -p ahand-platform", "acceptanceCriteria": ["explicit DACL no Everyone", "SDDL builder unit-tested", "owner still connects"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Windows security regression suite
tasks.description:
Windows analogues for cfg(unix) security tests (symlink/junction escape, ACL, case denylist); fixtures via canonicalize_simplified; no-analogue (openat2) stays gated+commented.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/tests/file_ops.rs", "crates/ahandd/tests/file_ops_e2e.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd --test file_ops --test file_ops_e2e", "acceptanceCriteria": ["windows CI exercises security model", "no raw .canonicalize() in fixtures"]}
```
